creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rick Macklem from comment #6)
Perhaps git and cargo are using fstat() instead of stat().  However, they aren't long-running programs; they're CLI utilities.  So if they're doing fstat(), then they must also do some variety of open().  Wouldn't that also have to do a Lookup if there's a miss in the name cache?
